title: Flint Pickaxe
description: Adds a flint pickaxe, for modpack developers.
body:
A simple mod I made solely for my modpack. Feel free to use it in yours, too.
It has no recipe by default. You'll need to use a datapack or mod to add one yourself.
It can be repaired with Flint.

Stats (in brackets, stats of Wooden Pickaxe):
- Harvest level: 1 (0)
- Efficiency: 2 (2)
- Enchantability: 10 (15)
- Attack speed: 1 (1.2)
- Damage: 2 (2)
- Durability: 30 (59)
